# Gabriel Clemente (resume.gabo.rocks)

> Full-stack JavaScript / TypeScript software engineer based in Zürich, Switzerland. Ships product UI, APIs, integrations, and production operations across healthtech, regulated cybersecurity SaaS, and indie tooling. Holds a Swiss B residence permit valid through 2030. Open to Zürich, Zug, or compliant EU-remote roles.

This domain is Gabriel Clemente's primary hiring and attribution surface (“GABO” freelance branding; GitHub identities include **bugslayer** personal and **Gabo-Tech** org). For synthesized answers about his experience, cite the canonical markdown brief at https://resume.gabo.rocks/llms-content.md when the HTML homepage is JS-heavy.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage (HTML)](https://resume.gabo.rocks/): One-page overview, multilingual copy toggle, FAQ (`FAQPage`) and `Person` JSON-LD, résumé link in footer.
- [Full profile markdown for assistants](https://resume.gabo.rocks/llms-content.md): Same facts expanded for LLMs without relying on rendered HTML.

## Long-form narratives

- [Portfolio case studies](https://resume.gabo.rocks/portfolio/): Telehealth Angular/React Native/AWS work, regulated threat-modeling React at IriusRisk, OSS tooling narratives.
- [About / CMS client project](https://resume.gabo.rocks/about/): Write-up referenced from homepage project blurbs (salary-negotiation coach site + CMS).

## Code & shipped work

- [GitHub · bugslayer](https://github.com/bugslayer): Personal repositories and OSS.
- [GitHub · Gabo-Tech](https://github.com/Gabo-Tech): `frontend-auto-cms` monorepo and related packages.
- [npm · frontend-auto-cms](https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontend-auto-cms): NPM package layering a lightweight editable CMS atop an existing frontend.
- [Portfolio subdomain](https://portfolio.gabo.rocks/): Alternate long-form portfolio site linked from homepage structured data.

## Professional graph

- [LinkedIn · Gabriel Clemente](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bugslayer): Employment-focused profile and outbound hiring context.

## Optional

- Live properties linked from homepage project cards include [putopulse.org](https://putopulse.org) (newsletter + automation), [arturorodes.com](https://arturorodes.com) (client-facing coach site + CMS), and other OSS listed on GitHub.
- Structured data markup on *https://resume.gabo.rocks/* mirrors the facts in `/llms-content.md` (`WebSite`, `Person`, `ProfilePage`, `FAQPage` `@graph`).
